tests.name: SSE: Auth required — no session → 401
tests.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized

tests.name: SSE: Tenant isolation — org A events invisible to org B
preconditions: Two users in different orgs connected
tests.expected_result: Org B receives no events from org A

tests.name: SSE: Heartbeat every 30s
tests.expected_result: :keepalive comment received within 35s window

tests.name: SSE: Reconnect with retry directive
tests.expected_result: Client reconnects within 3s (retry: 3000)

tests.name: SSE: Event type filtering
tests.expected_result: Client receives clinical_alert, not message_received

tests.name: SSE: Multiple simultaneous connections
tests.expected_result: All 3 connections receive the event

tests.name: SSE: Cleanup on disconnect
tests.expected_result: Subscriber removed, heartbeat interval cleared

tests.name: SSE: Rate limit — max 10 connections per user
tests.expected_result: 429 Too Many Requests

tests.name: Twilio inbound: valid signature → 200 + message stored
tests.expected_result: 200, Message created in DB with encrypted content, SSE event emitted

tests.name: Twilio inbound: invalid signature → 403
tests.expected_result: 403, NO database write, audit log for failed attempt
invariant_coverage: CYRUS: VETO — no DB before signature check

tests.name: Twilio inbound: replay (same MessageSid) → 200 idempotent
tests.expected_result: 200 with status:duplicate, message NOT duplicated

tests.name: Twilio outbound: WhatsApp consent check
tests.expected_result: 403, failureReason contains 'consent'

tests.name: Twilio outbound: PHI filter strips CPF/CNS
tests.expected_result: 400, error E-2002 'clinical data detected'
invariant_coverage: RUTH: no PHI in message body

tests.name: Twilio outbound: template substitution
tests.expected_result: Message sent with {{patient_name}} replaced

tests.name: Twilio status: delivered → update message
tests.expected_result: Message.status=DELIVERED, deliveredAt set, SSE delivery_update emitted

tests.name: Twilio status: failed → update + error code
steps: POST status callback with MessageStatus=failed ErrorCode=30003
tests.expected_result: Message.status=FAILED, errorCode=30003

tests.name: Twilio: TWILIO_ENABLED=false → mock mode
tests.expected_result: Message created with status SENT, no actual Twilio API call

tests.name: Twilio inbound: first message creates Conversation
preconditions: No existing conversation for patient phone
steps: POST inbound webhook from new phone number
tests.expected_result: New Conversation created with channelType, patient linked, unreadCount=1

tests.name: Twilio: message content encrypted at rest
tests.expected_result: Content is encrypted, not plaintext

tests.name: Twilio: cross-tenant conversation isolation
steps: GET /api/comms/conversations with conversation from org B
tests.expected_result: Conversation not returned (filtered by organizationId)

tests.name: Clinical: HTN systolic ≥160 → critical alert
tests.expected_result: Alert with ruleId HTN-002, severity critical, urgency emergent

tests.name: Clinical: Drug interaction NSAID + anticoagulant
tests.expected_result: Alert DRUG-001, severity severe, hyperkalemia risk

tests.name: Clinical: PHQ-9 Q9 ≥2 → suicidal ideation critical
tests.expected_result: Rule MH-002 triggered, severity critical, emergency protocol reference (CVV 188, SAMU 192)

tests.name: Clinical: Missing lab data → INSUFFICIENT_DATA
tests.expected_result: Lab-dependent rules skipped (not fired with imputed zeros)

tests.name: Clinical: Every alert has sourceAuthority + citationUrl
tests.expected_result: Every alert object has non-empty sourceAuthority and valid citationUrl

tests.name: Clinical: Overdue mammography → screening alert
preconditions: Female patient age 55, last mammogram 26 months ago
tests.expected_result: screeningsDue contains MAMMOGRAM with priority overdue

tests.name: Clinical: Alert severity sorting — critical first
preconditions: Patient with HTN crisis + overdue screening
tests.expected_result: HTN-002 (critical) before screening (routine) in array

tests.name: Clinical: FINDRISC weighted scoring
preconditions: Patient answers with BMI >30 (3pts) + parent DM (5pts)
tests.expected_result: Score includes weighted values (not uniform 0-3)

tests.name: Clinical: Multi-rule — HTN + DM + depression
tests.expected_result: 3 alerts: HTN-001/002, DM-002, MH-001. All with sourceAuthority.

tests.name: Clinical: Alert dismissal — critical requires acknowledgment
steps: Click dismiss without checking acknowledgment box
tests.expected_result: Dismiss button disabled. Must check 'I have reviewed this alert' first.

tests.name: Co-Pilot: SOAP S suggestion
tests.expected_result: Suggestion text for Subjective section, confidence > 0

tests.name: Co-Pilot: SOAP A suggestion avoids diagnostic language
tests.expected_result: Text uses 'consistent with' or 'suggestive of', never 'diagnosed with'

tests.name: Co-Pilot: SaMD disclaimer on every response
tests.expected_result: Response includes disclaimer field with SaMD-safe text

tests.name: Co-Pilot: humanReviewRequired always true
tests.expected_result: humanReviewRequired === true in response

tests.name: Co-Pilot: Patient context aggregation
preconditions: Patient with meds, allergies, labs, problems, screenings
tests.expected_result: Response contains all 8 sections: patient, encounter, medications, allergies, recentLabs, activeProblems, recentEncounters, screeningScores

tests.name: Co-Pilot: Cross-tenant patient blocked
preconditions: User in org A, encounter belongs to org B
tests.expected_result: 404 (not 403, to prevent info leakage)

tests.name: Co-Pilot: Audit trail on suggestion
tests.expected_result: AuditLog entry with action COPILOT_SUGGEST, includes request+response hash

tests.name: Co-Pilot: Empty encounter context → graceful
tests.expected_result: Suggestion generated (may be generic), no error
